name: Composite Fabrication
description: Composite fabrication combines a matrix with a reinforcing phase: after selecting matrix chemistry, fibers or particles are surface-treated for wetting, then impregnated or infiltrated by the matrix, and interfacial bonding is verified before consolidation and curing produce the finished part.
mermaid:
graph TD
    N1["Matrix + reinforcement"]
    N2{"Choose matrix type"}
    N3["Polymer matrix route"]
    N4["Metal / ceramic matrix"]
    N5["Surface-treat fibers"]
    N6["Impregnate / infiltrate"]
    N7{"Strong interface?"}
    N8["Add coupling agent"]
    N9["Consolidate + cure"]
    N10["Composite part"]

    N1 --> N2
    N2 -->|polymer| N3
    N2 -->|metal/ceramic| N4
    N3 --> N5
    N4 --> N5
    N5 --> N6
    N6 --> N7
    N7 -->|no| N8
    N8 -->|retreat| N5
    N7 -->|yes| N9
    N9 --> N10

    style N1 fill:#ff6b6b,color:#fff

    style N3 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N4 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N5 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
